zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Boteler於從大約1377年到1385年出生在英國藍卡爾貝福時，她的父親Sir John Boteler57歲，母親Alice Plumpton50歲。她於1402年4月5日之前與Sir John Gerard of Bryn在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年9月15日在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Boteler于从大约1377年到1385年出生在英国藍卡爾貝福时，她的父亲Sir John Boteler57岁，母亲Alice Plumpton50岁。她于1402年4月5日之前与Sir John Gerard of Bryn在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年9月15日在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Boteler was born from about 1377 to 1385, in Bewsey, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John Boteler, was 57 and her mother, Alice Plumpton, was 50. She married Sir John Gerard of Bryn before 5 April 1402, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 15 September 1441, in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Boteler est née du environ 1377 au 1385, à Bewsey, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Boteler, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Alice Plumpton, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Gerard of Bryn avant 5 avril 1402, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1441, à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Boteler von um 1377 bis 1385 in Bewsey, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Boteler 57 und ihre Mutter Alice Plumpton 50. Sie hat vor 5. April 1402 in Lancashire, England Sir John Gerard of Bryn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. September 1441 in Lancashire, England.

Lei sposato Sir John Gerard of Bryn prima del 5 aprile 1402, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1441, nel Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Botelerがから約1377年まで1385年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイで生まれた時，父Sir John Botelerは57歳，母Alice Plumptonは50歳であった。1402年4月5日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir John Gerard of Brynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年9月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Boteler(이)가 대략 1377년 부터 1385년 까지 영국 랭카실르 브w시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Boteler(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Plumpton(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1402년 4월 5일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir John Gerard of Bryn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 9월 15일 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Boteler nasceu de aproximadamente 1377 a 1385, em Bewsey, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Boteler, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Alice Plumpton, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Gerard of Bryn antes 5 de abril de 1402, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1441, em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Boteler родилась с около 1377 по 1385 в местности бюси, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Boteler было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Plumpton, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Gerard of Bryn перед 5 апрель 1402 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 сентября 1441 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия.
